Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $191,204,754Details
International Box Office $293,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $485,004,754
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $37,781,423
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $62,049,358
Total $99,830,781
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O’Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder’s diabolical plan.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$65,575,105 (34.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,845 opening theaters/3,980 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $279,903,169

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 8th, 2014 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: September 5th, 2014 (Wide) (Australia)
October 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Spain)
February 6th, 2015 (Wide) (Japan)
Video Release: December 16th, 2014 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action violence.
(Rating bulletin 2333, 7/30/2014)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Franchise: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Live Action Remake, Motion Capture Performance, Reboot
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Martial Arts, Mutants, Talking Animals, Vigilante
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Platinum Dunes, Gama Entertainment, Mednick Productions, Heavy Metal
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O’Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder’s diabolical plan.
